MINI MINUTES: CHRISTOPHER B. DOLAN/DOLAN LAW FIRM'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR INNA GOGOLICYN.
Appearances: Matthew D. Gramly and Shawn R. Miller of the Dolan Law Firm (421.2800) counsel for plaintiff and moving to be relieved; no other appearances.
